measures.jurisdiction: Benton County Fire Protection District No. 4
measures.title: Restoration of Regular Property Tax Levy
measures.what_it_does: Restores the fire district's regular levy rate with a 106% limit factor for nine years (West Richland area).
measures.cost_line: Restores the levy to $1.50 per $1,000 of assessed value.

taxes.basis: YES approves a local tax, levy, bond, or annexation measure for the listed public service.

measures.jurisdiction: Benton County Fire Protection District No. 6
measures.title: Emergency Medical Services Levy
measures.what_it_does: Reestablishes an EMS levy for ten years beginning in 2027.
measures.cost_line: Up to $0.50 per $1,000 of assessed value.

taxes.basis: YES approves a local tax, levy, bond, or annexation measure for the listed public service.
